seo.title: 10 Best Hotels in Ayutthaya 2026 — Budget to Luxury
seo.metaDescription: Find the best hotel in Ayutthaya for your budget. Our 2026 guide covers 11 top-rated properties from budget guesthouses to riverside boutique hotels — with real prices, locations and honest tips.

intro: Ayutthaya is a compact, affordable destination where even the best hotels rarely exceed 4,000 THB per night. Most visitors come on a day trip from Bangkok, but staying overnight means quieter mornings at the temples, sunset views over the ruins and a chance to explore at a relaxed pace. Hotels cluster around the train station area (east bank), the historical island centre, and the riverside. Below are 11 properties across budget, mid-range and luxury categories with real 2025/2026 prices.

hotels.name: Baan Are Gong Riverside Homestay
hotels.description: A simple, family-run guesthouse on the east bank of the Pa Sak River with basic but clean rooms, a shared terrace overlooking the water and genuinely warm Thai hospitality. The owner helps with bicycle rental and local tips. Rooms are fan-cooled with shared bathrooms — no frills, but the riverside location and price make it a backpacker favourite.
highlights: Riverside terrace with views over the Pa Sak River
Family-run with warm, helpful hosts
Bicycle rental arranged on-site
Walking distance to the ferry and train station
Quiet, local neighbourhood feel

sources.sourceName: Breathing Travel — Where to Stay Ayutthaya

hotels.name: Baan Keang Chon Ayutthaya
hotels.description: A charming wooden riverside guesthouse with a sun terrace right on the Chao Phraya River. Rooms are simple but well-maintained with A/C, and the common area with river views is a highlight. One of the best budget options for atmosphere and location — watching boats pass by from the terrace at sunset is a highlight.
highlights: Wooden riverside terrace with direct river views
Air-conditioned rooms with private bathrooms
Peaceful riverside setting away from traffic
Close to ferry crossing to the island
Good budget option with character

hotels.name: Ayothaya Riverside Hotel
hotels.description: Located just across the street from Ayutthaya train station, this no-frills hotel offers clean rooms with A/C, a minibar and Wi-Fi at very competitive prices. The ferry to the historical island is a 5-minute walk away, and the surrounding streets are full of street food stalls and local restaurants. A practical, well-located base.
highlights: Right next to Ayutthaya train station — ideal if arriving by train
Air-conditioned rooms with private bathrooms
Street food stalls and convenience stores nearby
5-minute walk to the ferry crossing to the island
Good value for the location

hotels.name: The Avail Ayutthaya
hotels.description: A modern, well-designed hotel on the historical island within cycling distance of all major temples. Rooms are compact but stylish with contemporary furnishings, good A/C and reliable Wi-Fi. The rooftop terrace offers views over the surrounding area. A strong choice for travellers who want comfort, location and value.
highlights: Central island location — walking distance to Wat Mahathat and Wat Ratchaburana
Modern, stylish rooms with good air conditioning
Rooftop terrace with area views
Bicycle rental available
Strong Wi-Fi throughout

hotels.name: Mayuu Ayutthaya Hotel
hotels.description: A boutique-style hotel on the island that blends modern Thai design with a convenient location near the main temples. Clean, well-appointed rooms with quality bedding, good bathrooms and a small garden area. Staff are notably helpful with local recommendations and transport arrangements.
highlights: Boutique design with modern Thai aesthetic
Central location on the island near major temples
Helpful staff with local knowledge
Clean rooms with quality bedding
Quiet garden area

hotels.name: S3 Ayutthaya Hotel
hotels.description: One of the most popular mid-range hotels in Ayutthaya, S3 offers clean, spacious rooms in a modern building right on the island. A swimming pool (rare at this price point in Ayutthaya), decent breakfast buffet and helpful front desk make it a reliable choice. Bicycle rental is available at the hotel.
highlights: Swimming pool — uncommon in Ayutthaya's mid-range
Spacious, modern rooms with strong A/C
Breakfast buffet included in most rates
Bicycle rental on-site
Central island location with easy temple access

hotels.name: Classic Kameo Hotel & Serviced Apartments
hotels.description: A well-established 4-star hotel on U-Thong Road offering both hotel rooms and serviced apartments. The property features a swimming pool, fitness centre, restaurant and spacious rooms with work desks. Popular with both tourists and business travellers, it represents a reliable, international-standard option in Ayutthaya.
highlights: Swimming pool and fitness centre
Serviced apartments available for longer stays
On-site restaurant with Thai and international menu
Professional, business-standard service
Free parking — useful if driving from Bangkok

hotels.name: Centara Ayutthaya
hotels.description: Part of the well-known Centara hotel chain, this property brings brand reliability to Ayutthaya. Rooms are modern and well-maintained, with a swimming pool, restaurant and all the amenities expected from a Thai chain hotel. The location on U-Thong Road provides easy access to both the historical island and the train station area.
highlights: Centara chain reliability and service standards
Swimming pool and restaurant
Modern rooms with good amenities
Convenient location between the island and train station
Good breakfast buffet

hotels.name: iuDia on the River
hotels.description: A boutique riverside hotel set in a beautifully restored traditional Thai house overlooking the Pa Sak River. Rooms blend vintage charm with modern comfort — think dark wood, crisp white linens and rain showers. The riverside deck where breakfast is served, with views of boats drifting past and temple spires on the horizon, is one of the most atmospheric dining spots in Ayutthaya.
highlights: Restored traditional Thai house with vintage character
Riverside deck with temple views for breakfast
Boutique rooms with rain showers and quality furnishings
Walking distance to the main temple circuit
Bicycle rental included

sources.sourceName: Breathing Travel — Where to Stay Ayutthaya

hotels.name: Sala Ayutthaya
hotels.description: The premier hotel in Ayutthaya: a striking contemporary riverside property directly opposite Wat Phutthai Sawan. Designed by award-winning architects, the minimalist concrete-and-glass rooms frame the river through floor-to-ceiling windows. The rooftop pool overlooks illuminated temple ruins at night, and the on-site restaurant serves excellent Thai cuisine with river views. This is where to stay if you want Ayutthaya's most memorable overnight experience.
highlights: Award-winning contemporary architecture on the riverside
Rooftop pool with views of illuminated temple ruins
Floor-to-ceiling windows framing the Chao Phraya River
Excellent on-site restaurant with river views
Directly opposite Wat Phutthai Sawan

hotels.name: Sala Bang Pa-In
hotels.area: Bang Pa-In (20 km south of Ayutthaya)
hotels.description: Set on a private island in the Chao Phraya River near the Bang Pa-In Royal Palace, this luxury resort features pool villas surrounded by water and lush gardens. The most upscale accommodation option in the Ayutthaya area, it combines river seclusion with easy access to both Ayutthaya's temples and the royal palace. A retreat rather than a city hotel.
highlights: Private island setting in the Chao Phraya River
Pool villas with river views
Close to Bang Pa-In Royal Palace
Serene, resort-style atmosphere
Spa and fine dining on-site

sources.sourceName: Breathing Travel — Where to Stay in Ayutthaya
